meaning: n.康士坦茨湖(位于瑞士、德国和奥地利交界处)
examples: His sister, the poet Constance Urdang, died in 1996.
But as it turns out, her mother Constance had been putting the money toward other bills -plastic surgery bills.
But as it turns out, her mother Constance had been putting the money toward other bills - plastic surgery bills.
The NFL Network and Sanders' business manager, Constance Schwartz, declined to comment about the incident.
